non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: Common shares were elected to defer receipt of previously granted restricted common shares upon vesting thereof. This Form 4 reports the disposition of such restricted shares in exchange for an equal number of units under the applicable deferred compensation plan.

non_derivative_holdings.transaction_summary: Common shares were elected to defer receipt of previously granted restricted common shares upon vesting thereof. This Form 4 reports the disposition of such restricted shares in exchange for an equal number of units under the applicable deferred compensation plan.

derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: These units will be paid out in an equal number of Common Shares at the time elected by the reporting person, subject to the vesting provisions of the plan.

derivative_holdings.transaction_summary: These units will be paid out in an equal number of Common Shares at the time elected by the reporting person, subject to the vesting provisions of the plan.

footnotes.1: The reporting person elected to defer receipt of previously granted restricted common shares upon vesting thereof. This Form 4 reports the disposition of such restricted shares in exchange for an equal number of units under the applicable deferred compensation plan.
footnotes.3: These units will be paid out in an equal number of Common Shares at the time elected by the reporting person, subject to the vesting provisions of the plan.
footnotes.4: Expiration Date is the same as the Date Exercisable.
